item.description: Index This is the index for Math section. Probability: [[Mathematics/Porbability/Probability Models and Axioms]]

Probability Models and Axioms Goals Probability as a mathematical framework for reasoning about uncertainty Sample space Axioms of probability Simple Examples Symbols: P(A) The probability of the subset/event A ∨ This is the symbol for the OR operation ∧ This is the symbol for the AND operation Ω This is the symbol for the entire set in the sample space A'c Complement of A, The set of probability that are not A Sample Space What is a Sample Space?
